Class ClassChangingItemCard

java.lang.Object
nongui.baseentity.BaseCard
nongui.baseentity.ActionCard
nongui.baseentity.cards.Itemcard.ItemCard
nongui.baseentity.cards.Itemcard.ClassChangingItemCard
Direct Known Subclasses:
BFSword, ForbiddenIdol, GiantsBelt, NeedlesslyLargeRod, RecurveBow, SerratedDirk
public class ClassChangingItemCard extends ItemCard
Represents an item card that alters a hero's class when equipped. It safely stores the hero's original class and restores it when unequipped.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • ClassChangingItemCard

      public ClassChangingItemCard(String name, String flavorText, String abilityDescription, UnitClass newClass)
      Constructs a new ClassChangingItemCard with the specified details.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the item.
      flavorText - The lore or background text.
      abilityDescription - The description of the item's effect.
      newClass - The new UnitClass to apply to the hero when equipped.

  • Method Details

    • onEquip

      public void onEquip(HeroCard hero)
      Triggers when the item is equipped to a hero. Saves the hero's current class before overwriting it with the new class.
      Specified by:
      onEquip in class ItemCard
      Parameters:
      hero - The hero equipping the item.

    • onUnEquip

      public void onUnEquip(HeroCard hero)
      Triggers when the item is unequipped from a hero. Restores the hero's class back to its original state.
      Specified by:
      onUnEquip in class ItemCard
      Parameters:
      hero - The hero unequipping the item.
